title: Savrip (disambiguation)
content:
'''Savrip''' referred to several things:

*The [[Mantellian Savrip]], a [[Sentience|sentient]] [[species]] native to [[Ord Mantell]].
*[[Savrip (language)|Savrip]], the language of the aforementioned species.
*[[Savrip (Marauder-class corvette)|''Savrip'']], a [[Marauder-class corvette|''Marauder''-class corvette]]

{{Disambig}}
